LanguageData.ARA_Huge_Weapon_Category.label: large armed organs
LanguageData.ARA_Huge_Weapon_Category.description: This kind of armed organ is quite huge, and only those large Arachnids (size greater than 2.0) can use this weapon.
LanguageData.ARA_Weapon_Damage_Category.label: Special weapons
LanguageData.ARA_Weapon_Damage_Category.description: In addition to causing regular damage, this armed organ can also cause other effects.
